series_metadata.series_description: a.)Executed contracts with consultants for personal services rendered, b.) reciprocity agreements, c) contracts for temporary office help, d.) Agreements with universities for services provided and/or procedures, e.) Maintenance agreements, f.) leases of office space, g.) rental of equipment or storage space agreements, h.) Inter-agency agreements such as rental of data processing services, and i.) other legally binding contracts that are executed by the agency

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: following termination of contract, or audit is conducted and all audit discrepancies are resolved, whichever is longer ; Electronic: following termination of contract, or audit is conducted and all audit discrepancies are resolved, whichever is longer
